DescribeJobs.resourcePoolId: Unique identifier of the resource pool; pass the pool ID (e.g., cce-1uji3ib5) for self-managed pools, or `aihc-serverless` for managed pools
DescribeJobs.queueID: Required for managed resource pools; the queue ID
DescribeJobs.queue: Queue to which the training job belongs; provide queue name for general resource pools (omit to return all), or queue ID for managed resource pools
DescribeJobs.keywordType: Keyword filter type; currently supports `name` and `queueName` only
DescribeJobs.orderBy: Sort field; supports `createdAt` and `finishedAt`, defaults to `createdAt`
DescribeJobs.order: Sort order; `asc` for ascending, `desc` for descending, defaults to `desc`
DescribeJobs.pageSize: Number of results per page, defaults to 10
